rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Agent is sandboxed to task directory only (/.kody/tasks/<id>/) and cannot access parent dirs, src/, or package.json — Explore agents also fail due to same model restriction.","scope":"pipeline/sandbox"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Chart/table components in Next.js server-component dashboards must use 'use client' directive even if parent is a server component.","scope":"nextjs"},{"kind":"convention","text":"No chart/table libraries pre-installed (no recharts, chart.js, tanstack-table) — must install dependency first before using.","scope":"frontend"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"The build stage should run `npm install` and `npm run build` after code changes to verify compilation succeeds; skipping this means build errors go undetected.","scope":"build"}]}
